# Inflection validation (inflect-eval)

**Denominator:** every single-word official lemma (noun/adjective/verb), 15988 lemmas → 244082 paradigm cells generated by the bundled `interslavic` crate. Blank cells are inflector panics recovered by `catch_unwind`. Grammar invariants are the citation-form and ending rules RULE_SPEC §3 states.

| Measurement | value |
|---|---:|
| blank cells | **0** of 244082 (0.00%) |
| — adj | 0 of 139008 (0.00%) |
| — noun | 0 of 100344 (0.00%) |
| — verb (whole paradigm) | 0 of 4730 (0.00%) |

## Grammar invariants (RULE_SPEC §3)

| invariant | pass | rate |
|---|---:|---:|
| adj nom.sg.f ends -a | 2896/2896 | 100.0% |
| adj nom.sg.m = citation form | 2896/2896 | 100.0% |
| adj nom.sg.n ends -o/-e | 2896/2896 | 100.0% |
| masc/neut gen.sg ends -a | 4142/4151 | 99.8% |
| noun nom.sg = citation form | 8358/8362 | 100.0% |
| suppletive plurals (§3.1) | 4/4 | 100.0% |
